fixtures.reason: The source row does not match the claimed Oakland plan area.
The claimed table or figure is not the rendered source table.
The page image and source page do not resolve to the same source catalog entry.
Adopted and draft source statuses cannot be swapped.
Draft values cannot enter the adopted matrix.
EPC context cannot become probability.
Population exposure cannot become a hazard score.
One hazard cannot consume another hazard's scenario.
One plan area's row cannot feed another plan area's matrix cell.
A category from an adjacent column must be corrected by explicit review action.
A correct PDF page cannot verify a candidate if the table identifier is wrong.
A visible table cannot verify a value attached to the wrong plan-area row.
A value from one scenario cannot verify another scenario.
A batch missing a required continuation page cannot be approved.
A cropped source image without the table title cannot support verification.
A footnote that changes metric meaning requires semantic review before value approval.
Plan-area aliases must map explicitly to the official area or be rejected.
A category copied from a neighboring plan-area row is a row mismatch.
Risk Ranking Score and Hazard Risk Rating must remain distinct columns.
Adopted table batches cannot use draft source pages or draft page images.
